info.title: Scholiq Register
info.description: Register containing all schemas for the Scholiq application. v0.2.0 declares Scholiq's AVG Art. 30 processing activities (learner administration, attendance & leerplicht reporting, grading & assessment, signed attestations, credentialing, data exchange to DUO/OSO/municipality/HR, and AI features) as x-openregister-processing catalogue annotations on LearnerProfile, AttendanceRecord, Assessment, Attestation, Credential, DataExchangeJob, and AiFeature. Each carries purpose (doelbinding), legal basis (rechtsgrond), data categories, backend identifier, retention reference, owner/review fields, and opts the schema into OpenRegister's per-access read-logging (logReads:true, attribution.default referencing the activity code). Seeds arrive as drafts; the school's privacy officer activates them in the OpenRegister lifecycle. v0.3.0 adds ADR-046 portal-identity scoping refs (learnerRef / learnerRefs / submittedByRef / guardianRefs) alongside the existing Nextcloud-user-id fields on GradeEntry, FinalGrade, AttendanceRecord, Enrolment, Submission, ExcuseRequest, LearnerProfile, and GradeNotification — additive, optional, fail-closed; see openspec/changes/portal-identity/. v0.3.1 strips the AiFeature schema to its AVG Art. 30 processing carrier only — EU AI Act high-risk feature governance (lifecycle, DPO acknowledgement, register pages) is delegated to the Hermiq app (ADR-005 amendment). Requires OpenRegister >= 0.2.14. See openspec/specs/avg-verwerkingsregister/spec.md. v0.4.0 adds beroepspraktijkvorming (BPV) — six new schemas (Praktijkopleider, BpvPlacement, Praktijkovereenkomst, PokSignature, WerkprocesAssessment, BpvVisitReport) implementing the MBO work-placement/POK/leerbedrijf-verification/werkproces-assessment domain (WEB art. 7.2.8/7.2.9). No existing schema is modified. See openspec/changes/bpv-praktijkovereenkomst/. v0.5.0 adds parent-conferences (oudergesprekken-cyclus) — five new schemas (ConferenceRound, TeacherAvailability, ConferenceSignup, ConferenceSlot, ConferenceReport) implementing conference-round invitations, guardian/self signup, ConferenceScheduleGenerator's greedy conflict-free slot generation, and an append-only gespreksverslag (ConferenceReport). No existing schema is modified. See openspec/changes/parent-evening-planner/. v0.6.0 adds exam-board (examencommissie) case handling — two new schemas (ExemptionCase, FraudCase) implementing the WHW art. 7.13 exemption (vrijstelling) and fraud/plagiarism dossier flows: ExemptionCase submitted→in-assessment→granted|rejected|withdrawn with ExemptionGrantHandler bridging a grant into a published GradeEntry (sourceKind=exemption); FraudCase reported→hearing-scheduled→heard→decided(+dismissed) with FraudCaseDecisionGuard stamping a 42-day appealDeadline and FraudCaseDecisionHandler invalidating a contested concept GradeEntry on a fraud-proven verdict. GradeEntry gains sourceKind=exemption, exemptionCaseId/fraudCaseId refs, conditional value requiredness, FraudCaseBlockGuard on publish/republish, and a new invalidated terminal state; GradeEntry/FinalGrade gain an examboard RBAC read role. See openspec/changes/exam-board-case-handling/. v0.6.1 is doc-only: DataExchangeJob.target's description gains the 'ooapi-catalog' example, naming the OpenConnector target that syncs published/archived Course, Programme, and Cohort objects to the OOAPI 5.0 catalog hosted by opencatalogi, per the course-management publication contract resolving the course-management/data-exchange OOAPI self-contradiction. No schema/type change — target was already a free-text string. See openspec/changes/delegate-ooapi-to-opencatalogi/. v0.7.0 adds LtiToolPlacement — places an external LTI 1.3 tool inside a Course/Lesson, naming the corresponding lti_deployment UUID in OpenConnector's own register plus an optional CurriculumPlan/component/GradeScale mapping for AGS grade passback; brings the previously-dead Lesson.contentType='lti' enum value to life (contentRef now names an LtiToolPlacement, doc-only correction). GradeEntry.sourceKind gains lti-ags, plus ltiToolPlacementId/ltiAgsResultId fields (same per-sourceKind-id-field shape as submissionId/assessmentResultId/sessionId), so an LTI Assignment & Grade Services score carries an honest, traceable, idempotent origin. See openspec/changes/lti-tool-placement/. v0.8.0 adds the competency capability — CompetencyFramework (a named taxonomy with its own proficiencyLevels scale), Competency (recursive via parentId, mirroring Course.parentCourseId — a leaf Competency IS the learning outcome, no separate LearningOutcome schema), and CompetencyAttainment (a FinalGrade-shaped, read-only, per-(learnerId, competencyId) roll-up recomputed by the new CompetencyAttainmentRollupHandler listener). Course, Lesson, Assignment, Assessment, Item, Credential, and Programme each gain an additive competencyIds/requiredCompetencyIds array. WerkprocesAssessment gains a nullable, server-resolved competencyId generalizing its existing kwalificatiedossierCode/kerntaakCode/werkprocesCode strings (unchanged in shape) into the shared taxonomy, and its confirm transition additionally fires CompetencyAttainmentRollupHandler alongside the existing WerkprocesGradeEmitHandler. See openspec/changes/competency-framework/. v0.9.0 adds learning-progress-and-analytics — LessonCompletion (one row per (learnerId, lessonId), source: xapi | manual, written by the new LessonProgressHandler sibling listener on the same XapiStatement ObjectCreatedEvent XapiCompletionHandler already consumes — no mandatoryTraining/last-lesson gate — plus a learner self-serve manual path); Enrolment gains completedLessonCount/totalPublishedLessonCount aggregate-refs and a progressPercent field (EnrolmentProgressEvaluator/EnrolmentProgressRollupHandler, mirroring FinalGrade.value/GradeFormulaEvaluator — no division operator exists in the calculation DSL); EngagementScore (per learnerId+courseId time-on-task/recency/score, EngagementScoreEvaluator), EngagementRiskThreshold + EngagementRiskFlag (deterministic rule-based at-risk detection generalised beyond the HE/MBO-only BsaTrajectory, mirroring AttendanceThreshold/AttendanceFlag and BsaTrajectory/BsaProgressFlag, via the new EngagementSignalHandler). GroupTrendHeatmap.vue renders a cohort x period grade-trend heat map over existing GradeEntry data — no new schema. See openspec/changes/learning-progress-and-analytics/. v0.10.0 adds adaptive-release-and-prerequisites — closes the prerequisite hole: Course gains prerequisiteCourseIds (array of $ref Course), enforced by the new EnrolmentPrerequisiteListener on OpenRegister's ObjectCreatingEvent for the enrolment schema (NOT a lifecycle `requires` guard — Enrolment has no transition into its initial pending state for one to attach to; mirrors decidesk's SubmissionDeadlineListener/larpingapp's CharacterRequirementListener creation-time-veto shape). Lesson and Assessment each gain releaseConditions (array of {kind: lesson-completed|assessment-min-score, lessonId?, assessmentId?, minScore?}, AND-combined) and availableAfterDays (nullable integer — drip release relative to each learner's OWN Enrolment.created), evaluated per-learner at request time by the new stateless LessonReleaseEvaluator/LessonReleaseController (no @self/@aggregate/@ref calc-DSL token carries a per-viewer identity, so this cannot be materialised). Assessment's existing availableFrom/availableUntil/isAvailable absolute window is unchanged; the new gates layer on top. See openspec/changes/adaptive-release-and-prerequisites/. v0.11.0 adds report-card (periodic rapport composition & rapportvergadering review) — three new schemas: ReportPeriod (the school-wide term a report is composed for: periodCode matching GradeEntry.period/CurriculumPlan.components[].period/FinalGrade.breakdown.periods keys, curriculumPlanIds[]/cohortIds[] scope, a nullable lockDate backing a materialised isLocked calculation — NOT an automatic lifecycle transition, mirroring ConferenceRound.isBookingClosed's documented 'scheduled triggers cannot drive a transition' precedent); ReportCard (one composed document per learner per ReportPeriod: subjectGrades[] snapshotting FinalGrade.breakdown.periods[periodCode] plus sourceGradeEntryIds[], an attendanceSummary, mentor/teacher comments, a forward-compatible nullable competencyAttainment field, and fail-soft docudesk PDF-render state fields; lifecycle draft → rapportvergadering-review → finalised → published-to-parents, with reopen back to review); ReportCardParentNotification (append-only fan-out record mirroring GradeNotification's shape). ReportCardComposer (Listener, ADR-031 cross-object write bridge mirroring DataExchangeRunHandler's composeLeerplichtDossier/composeSwvDossier assembly shape, NOT the DataExchangeJob queue) composes ReportCards on ReportPeriod's compose transition and on ReportCard's recompose self-loop. GradeEntry.publish/republish's requires guard is swapped from FraudCaseBlockGuard to ReportPeriodLockGuard, which composes FraudCaseBlockGuard's existing check internally then additionally blocks publishing into a locked ReportPeriod's scope unless the actor holds admin/mentor/principal — a single-guard composition, not a second `requires` array entry: verified at HEAD (LifecycleAnnotationValidator::validate + LifecycleGuardRegistry::resolve) that `requires` is strictly a single DI-tag string, never an array, so 'second requires entry' precedents named in this change's own design.md (Credential.revoke) do not actually exist as an array in this register — Credential.revoke has exactly one requires guard. ReportCard.publishToParents requires ReportCardVisibilityGuard, which re-resolves every contributing GradeEntry.visibleFrom at the moment of publication (not trusted from compose time) so grade-visibility-scheduling's promise holds end-to-end. PortalContributionProvider::parentContribution() gains a fourth parentReportCards collection, identical childJoin reverse-scope pattern to parentGrades/parentAttendance/parentExcuseRequests, filtered to lifecycle published-to-parents only. See openspec/changes/report-card-composer/.

x-openregister.description: Scholiq — open-source LVS + LMS for Nextcloud compliance training, certification, and learning management.

x-openregister-processing.doelbinding: Issue, verify, and revoke verifiable credentials (EDCI / Open Badges 3.0) attesting completed courses and certifications for learners.
x-openregister-processing.retentionReference: not declared (Credential carries no x-openregister-archival annotation; align with the school's selectielijst)

Credential.title: Credential
Credential.description: Verifiable Credential (W3C VC + Open Badges 3.0). Append-only compliance evidence; issued on enrolment completion; supports expiry detection with tiered reminders.

learnerId.description: Opaque learner UUID. Never BSN.
learnerId.title: Learner ID

courseId.description: UUID of the associated Course. Null for manually issued credentials.
courseId.title: Course ID

expiresAt.description: ISO 8601 expiry timestamp. Null = does not expire.
expiresAt.title: Expires At

issuerDid.description: Decentralised Identifier of the issuing organisation.
issuerDid.title: Issuer DID

signature.description: RS256 compact JWS produced by CredentialSigningService.
signature.title: Signature

revocationReason.description: Human-readable revocation reason. Set on revoke transition.
revocationReason.title: Revocation Reason

issuedBy.description: Display name of the issuing organisation.
issuedBy.title: Issued By

regulationSlug.description: Regulation identifier (e.g. NIS2) inherited from the Course.
regulationSlug.title: Regulation Slug

enrolmentId.description: UUID of the originating Enrolment that triggered issuance. Used for idempotency (one credential per enrolment). Distinct from renewalEnrolmentId which records the renewal enrolment created on expiry.
enrolmentId.title: Enrolment ID

renewalEnrolmentId.description: UUID of the renewal Enrolment created on expiry. Written back by OR batch.
renewalEnrolmentId.title: Renewal Enrolment ID

verificationUrl.description: Public URL for unauthenticated credential verification.
verificationUrl.title: Verification URL

walletOfferStatus.description: EUDI-wallet offer delivery state. Orthogonal to `lifecycle` (which describes the credential's own validity, not wallet delivery). Null until the credential has first been pushed to a wallet.
walletOfferStatus.title: Wallet Offer Status

walletOfferedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the credential was pushed to the EUDI wallet via the `offerToWallet` transition. Null until first pushed.
walletOfferedAt.title: Wallet Offered At

walletClaimedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when openconnector reported the wallet holder claimed the offer. Null until claimed.
walletClaimedAt.title: Wallet Claimed At

walletAttestationRef.description: Opaque reference to the openconnector OpenID4VCI credential-offer/issuance session (the offer's UUID on openconnector's `eudi_credential_offer` object). Correlation key for claim sync-back and revocation propagation.
walletAttestationRef.title: Wallet Attestation Reference

walletOfferError.description: Last wallet-offer push or revocation-propagation failure message. Cleared on the next successful `offerToWallet`.
walletOfferError.title: Wallet Offer Error

competencyIds.description: UUIDs of Competency taxonomy nodes (competency capability) this issued credential attests the learner has attained — e.g. a diploma attesting every competency in its Programme's requiredCompetencyIds, or a microcredential attesting one leaf competency. Additive field — existing rows leave it empty; issuance logic is unchanged.
competencyIds.title: Competency IDs

lifecycle.description: Lifecycle state. Managed by OpenRegister; do not set directly.
lifecycle.title: Lifecycle State

x-property-rbac._comment: WF1 (wave-12): credentials contain signed PII. Learner sees own record; admins see all. Teachers have no read access — only the credential-holder and admins. Write stays lifecycle-controlled.

x-openregister-processing.doelbinding: Operate adaptive learning paths and AI-assisted item generation for learners and record decision traces for transparency and accountability. EU AI Act high-risk classification, DPO acknowledgement, and enablement of these features are governed centrally in the Hermiq app (ADR-005).
x-openregister-processing.retentionReference: not declared (AiFeature carries no x-openregister-archival annotation; align with the school's selectielijst)

AiFeature.title: AI Feature
AiFeature.description: AVG Art. 30 processing-activity declaration for Scholiq's AI-assisted learning. The EU AI Act high-risk feature register, DPO-acknowledgement gate, and lifecycle governance are delegated to the Hermiq app (ADR-005); this schema now only carries the processing-activity catalogue annotation.

slug.description: Machine-readable identifier for the processing-activity declaration.
slug.title: Feature Slug

description.description: Plain-language description of the AI-assisted learning processing.
description.example: Personalised course sequencing based on learner performance data.
description.title: Feature Description

Course.title: Course
Course.description: A course or training program (Schema.org Course). Lifecycle: draft → published → archived.

mandatoryTraining.description: Whether this course is mandatory training
mandatoryTraining.title: Mandatory Training

renewalCourseSlug.description: Slug of the renewal/refresher course for this training
renewalCourseSlug.title: Renewal Course Slug

certificateTemplate.description: nc:files path to PDF certificate template
certificateTemplate.title: Certificate Template

lifecycle.description: Course lifecycle state. Managed by OR lifecycle engine; do not set directly.
lifecycle.title: Lifecycle State

parentCourseId.description: UUID of the parent Course. Makes Course recursive — a 'module' is a Course used as a container. Null for top-level courses.
parentCourseId.title: Parent Course ID

curriculumPlanId.description: UUID of the CurriculumPlan governing this course. Consumed by the grading spec.
curriculumPlanId.title: Curriculum Plan ID

programmeIds.description: UUIDs of Programmes that include this Course.
programmeIds.title: Programme IDs

ectsCredits.description: Bologna-style ECTS credit value this course/module contributes toward a learner's cumulative EC total. Additive field — existing rows leave it null. Only meaningful for level hbo|wo|mbo; po/vo/corporate courses never set it. A downstream credit-summing calculation (e.g. study-progress's BsaProgressEvaluator) MUST treat null as 0, not as an error.
ectsCredits.title: ECTS Credits

competencyIds.description: UUIDs of Competency taxonomy nodes (competency capability) this course teaches. Additive field — existing rows leave it empty.
competencyIds.title: Competency IDs

prerequisiteCourseIds.description: UUIDs of Course objects a learner MUST hold a completed Enrolment for before they may enrol in this Course. Additive field — existing rows leave it empty/absent and are unaffected. Structurally identical to CurriculumPlan.requiredCourseIds/Course.programmeIds (array-of-$ref idiom). Enforced by the enrolment capability's EnrolmentPrerequisiteListener (ObjectCreatingEvent on enrolment) — not a lifecycle guard, since Enrolment has no transition into its initial pending state for a `requires` guard to attach to.
prerequisiteCourseIds.title: Prerequisite Course IDs

Lesson.title: Lesson
Lesson.description: A lesson / learning module within a Course (Schema.org LearningResource). Lifecycle: draft → published → retired.

courseId.description: UUID of the parent Course
courseId.title: Course ID

contentRef.description: nc:files path or cmi5 launch URL for those content types. For contentType='lti', this MUST be the UUID of an LtiToolPlacement object, not a raw link — a static URL cannot carry a signed OIDC launch; the placement is resolved server-side and the actual launch is delegated to OpenConnector's lti-13-platform adapter.
contentRef.title: Content Reference

learningObjectives.description: Learning objectives for this lesson, as free text. Superseded (not replaced) by competencyIds for anything that needs to roll up into a learner's CompetencyAttainment or be queried structurally — learningObjectives itself is not linked to the competency taxonomy and never rolls up; free text remains for anything competencyIds can't yet express.
learningObjectives.title: Learning Objectives

competencyIds.description: UUIDs of Competency taxonomy nodes (competency capability) this lesson teaches. Additive field — existing rows leave it empty.
competencyIds.title: Competency IDs

releaseConditions.description: Per-learner adaptive-release conditions, AND-combined: this Lesson is available to a learner only once every listed condition is satisfied for THAT learner. Additive field — existing rows leave it empty/absent, matching today's unconditional-on-publish behaviour. Evaluated per-learner at request time by LessonReleaseEvaluator — deliberately NOT materialised as a schema-level calculation, because availability differs per learner while this Lesson row is shared across every learner enrolled in the course (no @self/@aggregate/@ref calc-DSL token carries 'who is asking').

kind.description: Condition kind. lesson-completed requires an XapiStatement completion/passed verb for lessonId; assessment-min-score requires a graded AssessmentResult for assessmentId summing to at least minScore.
kind.title: Condition Kind

lessonId.description: UUID of the prerequisite Lesson. Required when kind is lesson-completed.
lessonId.title: Prerequisite Lesson ID

assessmentId.description: UUID of the prerequisite Assessment. Required when kind is assessment-min-score.
assessmentId.title: Prerequisite Assessment ID

minScore.description: Minimum summed score required on the referenced Assessment. Required when kind is assessment-min-score.
minScore.title: Minimum Score

releaseConditions.title: Release Conditions

availableAfterDays.description: Drip-release delay: number of days after the learner's OWN Enrolment.created timestamp (for this Lesson's Course) before the lesson becomes available to that learner. Null = no drip delay (today's behaviour). This is the same static duration for every learner (safely declarative); the per-learner RESOLVED instant (enrolment.created + N days) differs per learner sharing this Lesson row, so it is resolved by LessonReleaseEvaluator at request time, never materialised. Applies in addition to any releaseConditions.
availableAfterDays.title: Available After Days (Drip)

mandatoryTraining.description: Whether this lesson is tagged as mandatory training
mandatoryTraining.title: Mandatory Training

regulationSlug.description: Regulation identifier for mandatory-training compliance tracking (e.g. NIS2, AVG, BIO)
regulationSlug.title: Regulation Slug

lifecycle.description: Lesson lifecycle state. Managed by OR lifecycle engine; do not set directly.
lifecycle.title: Lifecycle State

LtiToolPlacement.title: LtiToolPlacement
LtiToolPlacement.description: Places an external LTI 1.3 tool inside a Course or Lesson. Stores only the reference to the corresponding lti_deployment registration living in OpenConnector's own register (cross-app, bare UUID — OR relations do not span registers/apps) plus the optional grading-component mapping an AGS score for this placement feeds. Scholiq never stores or handles the OIDC/JWT material itself — that lives entirely in OpenConnector's lti-13-platform adapter. Lifecycle: draft → active → retired.

lessonId.description: UUID of the Lesson this tool is placed in. Null for a course-level placement not tied to one lesson.
lessonId.title: Lesson ID

courseId.description: UUID of the Course this tool is placed in. Null for a lesson-level placement.
courseId.title: Course ID

openconnectorDeploymentId.description: The lti_deployment object identifier living in OpenConnector's own register (a separate app/register set). Deliberately a plain string, not a canonical $ref (ADR-062 rule 7 scopes $ref to relations within the same register set) — mirrors DataExchangeJob.connectorRunId's bare-string cross-app pattern.
openconnectorDeploymentId.title: OpenConnector Deployment ID

launchMode.description: LTI launch message type for this placement.
launchMode.title: Launch Mode

curriculumPlanId.description: UUID of the CurriculumPlan an AGS score for this placement feeds. Null when this placement does not feed grade passback.
curriculumPlanId.title: Curriculum Plan ID

gradeEntryComponentId.description: The CurriculumPlan.components[].componentId an AGS score for this placement feeds. Mirrors Assessment.gradeEntryComponentId's exact naming. Null when this placement does not feed grade passback.
gradeEntryComponentId.title: Grade Entry Component ID

gradeScaleId.description: UUID of the GradeScale used to normalise an incoming AGS score for this placement. Null when this placement does not feed grade passback.
gradeScaleId.title: Grade Scale ID

lifecycle.description: Placement lifecycle state. Managed by OR lifecycle engine; do not set directly.
lifecycle.title: Lifecycle State

XapiStatement.title: XapiStatement
XapiStatement.description: xAPI 1.0.3 statement stored in the LRS substrate (append-only per ADR-002). Every save emits xapi.statement.received audit entry.

verb.description: xAPI Verb with id IRI and display map
verb.title: xAPI Verb

object.description: xAPI Activity, Agent, SubStatement, or StatementRef
object.title: xAPI Object

result.description: xAPI Result (score, success, completion, duration, extensions)
result.title: xAPI Result

context.description: xAPI Context (registration, instructor, team, contextActivities, extensions)
context.title: xAPI Context

timestamp.description: When the event described by the statement occurred
timestamp.title: Event Timestamp

stored.description: When the statement was received and stored by the LRS
stored.title: Stored Timestamp

courseId.description: UUID of the Course this statement relates to (Scholiq denormalisation)
courseId.title: Course ID

lessonId.description: UUID of the Lesson this statement relates to (Scholiq denormalisation)
lessonId.title: Lesson ID

verified_actor_id.description: Server-trusted learner identifier stamped by the xAPI ingest controller after authenticating the sender. NEVER derived from payload.actor.*. XapiCompletionHandler reads ONLY this field to prevent credential forgery (C6).
verified_actor_id.title: Verified Actor ID

x-openregister-authorization._comment: SB1 (wave-12): xapi-statement creation is admin-only as a stopgap until a dedicated xAPI ingest controller stamps verified_actor_id server-side. Prevents any authenticated user from forging xAPI statements with attacker-controlled verified_actor_id values. Track: issue #TBD.

LessonCompletion.title: LessonCompletion
LessonCompletion.description: Per-learner, per-Lesson completion state — one row per (learnerId, lessonId), an upsert target (not an append-only log; XapiStatement itself is already the append-only source of truth for the xAPI half — mirrors the relationship FinalGrade has to GradeEntry). Written by the new LessonProgressHandler for every resolvable completed/passed xAPI statement (no mandatoryTraining or last-lesson gate, unlike XapiCompletionHandler's Enrolment-completion path — a sibling listener on the same ObjectCreatedEvent<XapiStatement>, not an edit to that handler), or self-reported (source: manual) by the learner for content types that do not emit xAPI statements, mirroring AssessmentResult's unrestricted self-serve create posture. No x-openregister-lifecycle — a completion fact has no workflow states to move through. See openspec/changes/learning-progress-and-analytics/.

learnerId.description: Nextcloud user ID of the learner who completed the lesson. xAPI-sourced rows are written from XapiStatement.verified_actor_id only — NEVER from user-controlled payload.actor.* (the same C6 trust boundary XapiCompletionHandler already enforces).
learnerId.title: Learner ID

learnerRef.description: UUID reference to the LearnerProfile object — the portal-subject scoping key (ADR-046 A4). Distinct from learnerId, which is the Nextcloud user id. Additive and optional; existing rows leave it unset and stay invisible to the portal (fail-closed) until backfilled.
learnerRef.title: Learner Ref

courseId.description: UUID of the Lesson's parent Course (denormalized — mirrors XapiStatement.courseId/.lessonId).
courseId.title: Course ID

enrolmentId.description: UUID of the learner's active Enrolment in this Course. Resolved at write time by LessonProgressHandler the same way XapiCompletionHandler resolves the active enrolment today. Null when no active Enrolment is found, or for a manual completion (the frontend does not resolve it).
enrolmentId.title: Enrolment ID

source.description: Origin of the completion fact. xapi rows are written by LessonProgressHandler off a real XapiStatement; manual rows are learner self-reported for content types that do not emit xAPI statements.
source.title: Completion Source

verb.description: The xAPI verb IRI (completed or passed) when source is xapi. Null for manual completions.
verb.title: xAPI Verb

score.description: Result score (from XapiStatement.result.score.scaled) when present on the source statement. Null when the statement carried no score, or for manual completions.
score.title: Score

completedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp the lesson was completed. Refreshed (not duplicated) when a second completion statement/report arrives for the same (learnerId, lessonId).
completedAt.title: Completed At

x-property-rbac._comment: Progress-tracking rows are per-student PII and a teaching-relevant signal. Learner sees own rows; any teacher or admin sees all — the RBAC dialect grants role-wide (there is no existing precedent in this register for a cross-object 'teacher of this specific course's cohort' match; `match` only compares a self field to $userId), mirroring CompetencyAttainment's admin/role+self shape, the most recently established analogous block.

Enrolment.title: Enrolment
Enrolment.description: Learner enrolment in a course (Schema.org EnrollmentRequest)

learnerId.description: Nextcloud user ID of the enrolled learner.
learnerId.title: Learner ID

learnerRef.description: UUID reference to the LearnerProfile object — the portal-subject scoping key (ADR-046 A4). Distinct from learnerId, which is the Nextcloud user id. Additive and optional; existing rows leave it unset and stay invisible to the portal (fail-closed) until backfilled.
learnerRef.title: Learner Ref

courseId.description: UUID of the Course object in the scholiq register.
courseId.title: Course ID

mandatory.description: When true this enrolment is a compliance-mandatory assignment.
mandatory.title: Mandatory Enrolment

dueDate.description: ISO date by which the learner must complete the course. Null means no deadline.
dueDate.title: Due Date

managerId.description: Nextcloud user ID of the learner's line manager. Used for overdue alerts and fallback notifications.
managerId.title: Manager ID

bulkJobId.description: Browser-generated UUID grouping all Enrolments created by a single bulk-enrol modal submission. Used for polling progress.
bulkJobId.title: Bulk Job ID

reason.description: Free-text reason captured on withdrawal or failure transitions.
reason.title: Reason

regulationSlug.description: Machine-readable slug of the linked compliance regulation, e.g. 'avg-2018'. Used by compliance-audit to group evidence.
regulationSlug.title: Regulation Slug

cohortId.description: UUID of the Cohort this enrolment is associated with. Null for individually enrolled learners not in a cohort.
cohortId.title: Cohort ID

lifecycle.description: Enrolment lifecycle state. Managed by the OR lifecycle engine; do not set directly.
lifecycle.title: Lifecycle State

progressPercent.description: Percentage of the Course's published Lessons the learner has completed (completedLessonCount / totalPublishedLessonCount * 100, rounded; null-safe — reads 0 when either count is 0, never a divide-by-zero error). Derived — do not set manually. Mirrors FinalGrade.value's own 'Derived — do not set manually' shape; recomputed by EnrolmentProgressRollupHandler via EnrolmentProgressEvaluator whenever a LessonCompletion for this learner+course is created or updated (learning-progress-and-analytics).
progressPercent.title: Progress Percent

completedLessonCount.description: Declarative read-surface for the completedLessonCount aggregate-ref, mirroring Course.lessonCount's identical '@aggregate.<name>' idiom.

totalPublishedLessonCount.description: Declarative read-surface for the totalPublishedLessonCount aggregate-ref, mirroring Course.lessonCount's identical '@aggregate.<name>' idiom.

calculatedChange.description: Recompute progressPercent whenever a LessonCompletion for this (learnerId, courseId) is created or updated. Implemented via EnrolmentProgressRollupHandler listening on ObjectCreatedEvent<LessonCompletion> — NOT a TimedJob (ADR-022). Mirrors FinalGrade's own x-openregister-triggers block.

subject.nl: Je bent ingeschreven voor een verplichte cursus
subject.en: You have been enrolled in a mandatory course

subject.nl: Je verplichte cursus moet binnenkort afgerond zijn
subject.en: Your mandatory course is due soon

subject.nl: Een verplichte cursus van een medewerker is over tijd
subject.en: An employee's mandatory course is overdue

x-property-rbac._comment: WF1 (wave-12): enrolment records are per-student PII. Learner sees own record; managers see their reports; admins see all.

Regulation.title: Regulation
Regulation.description: Compliance regulation (AVG, BIO, NIS2, etc.) tracked for mandatory training coverage.

description.description: Plain-language description of the regulation and its applicability.
description.title: Regulation Description

applicabilityCriteria.description: Free-text applicability criteria describing which roles or departments must comply.
applicabilityCriteria.title: Applicability Criteria

requiresAnnualRenewal.description: Whether this regulation requires annual recertification.
requiresAnnualRenewal.title: Requires Annual Renewal

renewalCycleMonths.description: Renewal cycle in months (e.g. 12 for annual).
renewalCycleMonths.title: Renewal Cycle (Months)

active.description: Whether this regulation is currently enforced.
active.title: Active

ragRedThreshold.description: Coverage % below which RAG status is red.
ragRedThreshold.title: RAG Red Threshold

ragAmberThreshold.description: Coverage % below which RAG status is amber (and at or above ragRedThreshold).
ragAmberThreshold.title: RAG Amber Threshold

lifecycle.description: Lifecycle state. Managed by OR's lifecycle engine.
lifecycle.title: Lifecycle State

coveragePercent.description: Live coverage % = (mandatoryCompletedCount / mandatoryEnrolledCount) × 100. Returns 0 when no enrolments exist.

ragStatus.description: RAG status band: green ≥ ragAmberThreshold, amber ≥ ragRedThreshold, red < ragRedThreshold.

Attestation.title: Attestation
Attestation.description: Signed learner attestation that mandatory training was completed and understood. Append-only per ADR-008; HMAC-signed at lifecycle transition via AttestationSigningGuard.

learnerId.description: Nextcloud user ID or external learner identifier.
learnerId.title: Learner ID

lessonId.description: ID of the Lesson that was attested.
lessonId.title: Lesson ID

courseId.description: ID of the Course containing the attested lesson.
courseId.title: Course ID

regulationSlug.description: Slug of the Regulation this attestation is captured for.
regulationSlug.title: Regulation Slug

actorIp.description: IP address of the learner at time of attestation, for audit purposes.
actorIp.title: Actor IP Address

employeeId.description: HR system employee identifier, if available.
employeeId.title: Employee ID

score.description: Assessment score at time of attestation, if applicable.
score.title: Assessment Score

xapiStatementId.description: ID of the cmi5.completed XapiStatement that triggered this attestation.
xapiStatementId.title: xAPI Statement ID

signature.description: HMAC-SHA256 signature computed by AttestationSigningGuard at the drafted→signed transition.
signature.title: HMAC Signature

signingKeyId.description: OR tenant-key rotation ID used to compute the signature. Required for offline verification.
signingKeyId.title: Signing Key ID

lifecycle.description: Lifecycle state. Managed by OR's lifecycle engine.
lifecycle.title: Lifecycle State

x-openregister-processing.doelbinding: Record training a learner completed outside the LMS (classroom, third-party, conference) as first-class compliance evidence, with an officer verification gate and evidence file attachments, so that compliance coverage reflects real-world completions instead of forcing fake in-app enrolments.

ExternalTrainingRecord.title: ExternalTrainingRecord
ExternalTrainingRecord.description: An externally-completed training (classroom, third-party e-learning, conference, on-the-job) recorded per learner with evidence file attachments and an officer verification gate. A verified, unexpired record counts as compliance evidence for a matching regulation.

learnerId.description: UUID of the LearnerProfile this record belongs to.
learnerId.title: Learner ID

title.description: Human-readable training title, e.g. "NIS2 board awareness session".
title.title: Training Title

regulationSlug.description: Optional Regulation.slug this training provides coverage for (links into compliance coverage). Null = no regulation link.
regulationSlug.title: Regulation Slug

courseId.description: Optional UUID of an in-app Course considered equivalent.
courseId.title: Equivalent Course ID

validUntil.description: Optional expiry of the coverage this record provides. When set and in the past, the record no longer counts toward coverage.
validUntil.title: Valid Until

evidenceNote.description: Free-text note describing the evidence (e.g. "signed attendance list attached").
evidenceNote.title: Evidence Note

submittedBy.description: NC user ID of the person who recorded the training.
submittedBy.title: Submitted By

verifiedBy.description: NC user ID of the officer/HR/admin who verified the record. Must differ from submittedBy when the learner self-submitted.
verifiedBy.title: Verified By

rejectionReason.description: Reason captured when the record is rejected.
rejectionReason.title: Rejection Reason

credentialId.description: Optional UUID of a manual Credential issued on verification (links external certificates into the certification expiry machinery).
credentialId.title: Credential ID

batchId.description: Identifier shared by all records created together in one bulk classroom-session entry, so a batch can be verified and audited together.
batchId.title: Batch ID

lifecycle.description: Verification lifecycle state.
lifecycle.title: Lifecycle State

subject.nl: Nieuwe externe training '{{title}}' wacht op verificatie

LearnerProfile.title: LearnerProfile
LearnerProfile.description: Scholiq learner profile. Owns role assignment and is the actor reference for enrolments, credentials, and attestations.

ncUserId.description: Nextcloud user ID of the learner.
ncUserId.title: Nextcloud User ID

bsnEncrypted.description: Encrypted BSN — only populated for K-12 or government tenants. MUST be the base64-encoded ICrypto ciphertext; raw/plaintext BSNs are rejected by the minLength + pattern constraints below.
bsnEncrypted.title: Encrypted BSN

eckId.description: ECK iD for Dutch education identity federation.
eckId.title: ECK iD

roles.description: One or more Scholiq roles. The highest-priority role is materialised as primaryRole.
roles.title: Scholiq Roles

parentIds.description: Nextcloud user IDs of linked parent/guardian accounts.
parentIds.title: Parent / Guardian IDs

guardianRefs.description: UUID references to the guardian domain object(s) linked to this learner — the parent-audience portal linkage (ADR-046 A4). Distinct from parentIds, which are Nextcloud user ids. The portal resolves parent->learner via a one-hop join: it matches the parent subject's guardianRef against this array to find the child LearnerProfile, then reads that learner's records by learnerRef. Additive and optional; existing rows leave it unset (fail-closed) until backfilled.
guardianRefs.title: Guardian Refs

managerId.description: Nextcloud user ID of the learner's line manager.
managerId.title: Manager ID

department.description: Organisational department for grouping and reporting.
department.title: Department

mergedInto.description: UUID of the surviving LearnerProfile this profile was merged into. Set by the merge transition; null for active profiles.
mergedInto.title: Merged Into

lifecycle.description: Profile lifecycle state: active (in use), merged (duplicate merged into another profile; retained for audit), deleted (soft-deleted on offboarding; retained per AVG retention class until purge window expires). Managed by the OR lifecycle engine.
lifecycle.title: Lifecycle State

merge.description: Merges this profile into another LearnerProfile. The surviving profile is referenced via mergedInto.

delete.description: Soft-deletes the profile on offboarding. Purge after retention class expires.

x-property-rbac._comment: WF1 (wave-12): learner-profile contains personal data (parentIds, department, etc.). Learner sees own profile; admins see all.

Programme.title: Programme
Programme.description: A named educational or training track (HBO-V bachelor, NIS2 board certification, vmbo-tl examenjaar). Aggregates courses, declares a credential to issue on completion, and points at one CurriculumPlan.

curriculumPlanId.description: UUID of the governing CurriculumPlan. Null until a plan is assigned.
curriculumPlanId.title: Curriculum Plan ID

courseIds.description: Ordered list of Course UUIDs that form the programme's content spine.
courseIds.title: Course IDs

credentialTemplateId.description: UUID of the Credential template to issue on programme completion. Null = no auto-issuance.
credentialTemplateId.title: Credential Template ID

requiredCompetencyIds.description: UUIDs of Competency taxonomy nodes (competency capability) a learner must attain to complete this programme — the 'required by Programme' half of the skills-gap view (the other half, 'required by role', is declared on Competency.requiredForRoles). Additive field — existing rows leave it empty.
requiredCompetencyIds.title: Required Competency IDs

lifecycle.description: Programme lifecycle state. Managed by OR lifecycle engine.
lifecycle.title: Lifecycle State

CurriculumPlan.title: CurriculumPlan
CurriculumPlan.description: The governing assessment plan for a Programme. Carries the ordered component list (kolommen), weight per component, roll-up formula, grade scale, pass rules, and period structure. Profiles: PTA (Dutch VO), OER/studiegids (HE), opleidingsplan (MBO), training-curriculum (corporate), generic.

requiredCourseIds.description: UUIDs of courses that are mandatory in this plan.
requiredCourseIds.title: Required Course IDs

electiveCourseIds.description: UUIDs of elective / optional courses in this plan.
electiveCourseIds.title: Elective Course IDs

components.description: Assessment component definitions (kolommen). Each entry maps to one grade component with its weight, period, and kind.

componentId.description: Stable identifier for this component within the plan.
componentId.title: Component ID

weight.description: Relative weight of this component in the roll-up formula. E.g. 3 means this kolom contributes 3x.
weight.title: Component Weight

period.description: Period identifier or number this component belongs to.
period.title: Period

components.title: Assessment Components

formula.description: Roll-up formula for computing the final grade from weighted components.
formula.title: Roll-Up Formula

gradeScaleId.description: UUID of the GradeScale object (grading spec). Null = default 1-10 Dutch scale.
gradeScaleId.title: Grade Scale ID

componentId.description: If set: applies to that specific component. If null: applies to the final grade.
componentId.title: Component ID

minValue.description: Minimum passing value (e.g. 5.5 on Dutch 1-10 scale).
minValue.title: Minimum Pass Value

periods.description: Period definitions (e.g. SE-periodes for PTA, blokken for HE).
periods.title: Assessment Periods

gradeVisibilityPolicy.description: Default scheduled-visibility policy applied to GradeEntry notifications published under this plan when a teacher does not explicitly override visibleFrom. Null resolves to mode 'immediate' — today's behaviour (notify as soon as a GradeEntry publishes) — so every existing CurriculumPlan is unaffected until a school opts in.

mode.description: Visibility scheduling mode. 'immediate' = the resolved visibleFrom equals the publish moment. 'nextSchoolDay' = the resolved visibleFrom is the next non-weekend day at 'time' in 'timezone'.
mode.title: Visibility Mode

time.description: Local time of day (HH:MM, 24h) at which deferred grades become visible. Only meaningful when mode is 'nextSchoolDay'.
time.title: Visibility Time

timezone.description: IANA timezone identifier used to interpret 'time'. Only meaningful when mode is 'nextSchoolDay'.
timezone.title: Timezone

gradeVisibilityPolicy.title: Grade Visibility Policy

lifecycle.description: Plan lifecycle state. Managed by OR lifecycle engine.
lifecycle.title: Lifecycle State

Cohort.title: Cohort
Cohort.description: A group of learners doing a Course or Programme together in a given period. Members are LearnerProfile UUIDs; backed by a Nextcloud group for permissioning. Lifecycle: planned → active → completed | archived.

name.description: Human-readable cohort name, e.g. '3H Biologie 2025-2026' or 'NIS2 Batch A'.
name.title: Cohort Name

programmeId.description: UUID of the Programme this cohort runs. Null for standalone course cohorts.
programmeId.title: Programme ID

courseId.description: UUID of the specific Course this cohort runs (for standalone course cohorts).
courseId.title: Course ID

teacherIds.description: Nextcloud user IDs of assigned teachers / instructors.
teacherIds.title: Teacher IDs

learnerIds.description: Nextcloud user IDs of the LearnerProfile owners enrolled in this cohort.
learnerIds.title: Learner IDs

ncGroupId.description: Backing Nextcloud group ID used for file sharing and permissioning. Null until the cohort is activated.
ncGroupId.title: Nextcloud Group ID

academicYear.description: Academic or training year in YYYY or YYYY-YYYY format.
academicYear.title: Academic Year

lifecycle.description: Cohort lifecycle state. Managed by OR lifecycle engine.
lifecycle.title: Lifecycle State

RolloverPlan.title: RolloverPlan
RolloverPlan.description: A school-year rollover (jaarovergang) plan: per-cohort mappings and per-learner overrides, a side-effect-free dry-run report, and a resumable execution that promotes/retains/graduates/outflows learners, carries over mandatory enrolments, syncs NC groups, and archives the from-year cohorts.

fromAcademicYear.description: Academic year being rolled out of, e.g. "2025/2026".
fromAcademicYear.title: From Academic Year

toAcademicYear.description: Academic year being rolled into, e.g. "2026/2027".
toAcademicYear.title: To Academic Year

action.description: Cohort-level action; null blocks preview until resolved.
action.title: Rollover Action

toCohortName.description: Name of the to-year cohort to create (for promote).
toCohortName.title: To Cohort Name

toProgrammeId.description: Optional Programme for the to-year cohort.
toProgrammeId.title: To Programme ID

toCourseId.description: Optional Course for the to-year cohort.
toCourseId.title: To Course ID

carryNonMandatory.description: Per-mapping opt-in to also carry over non-mandatory enrolments.
carryNonMandatory.title: Carry Non-Mandatory Enrolments

learnerOverrides.description: Per-learner overrides of the cohort-level action.

learnerId.title: Learner ID
learnerId.description: Nextcloud user ID of the learner whose rollover action is overridden.

action.title: Override Action
action.description: Per-learner rollover action overriding the cohort-level action.

note.title: Override Note
note.description: Optional note explaining the override reason.

learnerOverrides.title: Per-Learner Overrides

dryRunReport.description: The most recent side-effect-free preview output (per-cohort counts, cohorts to create, enrolments to carry over, NC groups to sync). Null until previewed; cleared when mappings change.
dryRunReport.title: Dry Run Report

perMappingProgress.description: Map of fromCohortId -> "done" recording per-mapping completion so a failed run resumes without duplicating work.
perMappingProgress.title: Per-Mapping Progress

executedBy.description: NC user ID who executed the plan.
executedBy.title: Executed By

executedAt.title: Executed At
executedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the rollover was executed.

failureReason.description: Captured when the plan transitions to failed.
failureReason.title: Failure Reason

lifecycle.title: Lifecycle State
lifecycle.description: Current rollover plan lifecycle state. Managed by OR lifecycle engine.

Session.title: Session
Session.description: A scheduled occurrence of a Cohort meeting: a les, hoorcollege, or workshop. Carries start/end datetime, location (room or online URL), attached Materials, and linked Assignments. The unit a teacher takes attendance against.

cohortId.description: UUID of the Cohort this session belongs to.
cohortId.title: Cohort ID

courseId.description: UUID of the Course covered in this session. Null for administrative / non-content sessions.
courseId.title: Course ID

lessonId.description: UUID of the Lesson covered in this session. Null when not tied to a specific lesson.
lessonId.title: Lesson ID

startsAt.description: ISO 8601 start timestamp of the session.
startsAt.title: Start Time

endsAt.description: ISO 8601 end timestamp of the session.
endsAt.title: End Time

location.description: Room code or online URL (MS Teams, Zoom, etc.).
location.title: Location

materialIds.description: UUIDs of Material objects attached to this session.
materialIds.title: Material IDs

assignmentIds.description: UUIDs of Assignment objects linked to this session (forward reference to the assignments spec).
assignmentIds.title: Assignment IDs

lifecycle.description: Session lifecycle state. Managed by OR lifecycle engine.
lifecycle.title: Lifecycle State

sessionDayBucket.description: Deterministic day-bucket number (whole calendar days since a fixed 1970-01-01 epoch) derived from startsAt, ignoring time-of-day. Two Sessions on the same calendar date share the same bucket value, so AttendanceFlag.schoolDaysSinceFlag can count DISTINCT school days via count_distinct on this field instead of on the raw startsAt date-time (which would overcount days with multiple sessions). Added because OpenRegister's declarative calculation DSL (verified at HEAD across this register: dateDiff/dateAdd/if/case/eq/ne/gt/gte/lt/lte/and/or/prop/now — no string-format or date-truncation primitive) exposes no direct date-truncation operator. See verzuim-report-composer design.md task 1.2.

Material.title: Material
Material.description: Metadata for a file, presentation, reading, video, or SCORM/cmi5 package attached to a Course, Lesson, or Session. The bytes live in OpenRegister's native file attachments; this schema carries type, license, LOM-style tags, and ordering.

fileRef.description: OpenRegister file attachment reference (nc:files path or OR attachment ID). The app does NOT store file bytes.
fileRef.title: File Reference

url.description: External URL for kind='link' materials. Null for file-backed materials.
url.title: External URL

license.description: SPDX license identifier or rights statement.
license.title: License

lomTags.description: NL-LOM / VDEX keyword tags for discoverability.
lomTags.title: NL-LOM Tags

order.description: Display order within its parent (Course, Lesson, or Session). Lower values appear first.
order.title: Display Order

courseId.description: UUID of the Course this material is attached to. Null if attached at Lesson or Session level.
courseId.title: Course ID

lessonId.description: UUID of the Lesson this material is attached to. Null if attached at Course or Session level.
lessonId.title: Lesson ID

sessionId.description: UUID of the Session this material is attached to. Null if attached at Course or Lesson level.
sessionId.title: Session ID

Rubric.title: Rubric
Rubric.description: Reusable marking scheme with weighted criteria and level descriptors. A teacher attaches a Rubric to an Assignment; when marking a Submission the teacher picks a level per criterion and the points sum becomes the proposed grade.

description.description: Optional explanation of the rubric's purpose and use.
description.title: Rubric Description

criteria.description: Ordered list of assessment criteria, each with weight and achievement levels.

weight.description: Relative weight of this criterion. Used to compute the criterion's contribution to maxPoints.
weight.title: Criterion Weight

levels.description: Achievement levels from lowest to highest (e.g. insufficient, sufficient, good, excellent).

points.description: Points awarded when a learner achieves this level.
points.title: Points

levels.title: Achievement Levels

criteria.title: Assessment Criteria

maxPoints.description: Declared maximum possible score (sum of the top level across all criteria). Maintained by the rubric editor.
maxPoints.title: Maximum Points

lifecycle.description: Rubric lifecycle state. Managed by OR lifecycle engine.
lifecycle.title: Lifecycle State

Assignment.title: Assignment
Assignment.description: A deliverable that learners hand in: title, instructions, due date, rubric, and submission window. Belongs to a Course, Session, or both. Linked to a CurriculumPlan component to enable grade roll-up.

instructions.description: Rich-text instructions for the learner. Stored as HTML or Markdown.
instructions.title: Instructions

courseId.description: UUID of the Course this assignment belongs to. Null when only attached to a Session.
courseId.title: Course ID

sessionId.description: UUID of the Session this assignment belongs to. Null when only attached at Course level.
sessionId.title: Session ID

cohortId.description: UUID of the Cohort this assignment targets. Null for course-wide assignments.
cohortId.title: Cohort ID

curriculumPlanComponentId.description: Stable componentId from the parent CurriculumPlan.components array that this assignment scores. Used by the grading spec to map submissions to grade columns.
curriculumPlanComponentId.title: Curriculum Plan Component ID

briefingMaterialIds.description: UUIDs of Material objects provided as briefing resources for this assignment.
briefingMaterialIds.title: Briefing Material IDs

dueAt.description: Submission deadline. Null for open-ended assignments.
dueAt.title: Due At

maxPoints.description: Maximum points a learner can earn on this assignment.
maxPoints.title: Maximum Points

allowLateSubmission.description: Whether late submissions are accepted after dueAt. When false, SubmissionWindowGuard blocks submission after dueAt.
allowLateSubmission.title: Allow Late Submission

latePenaltyPercent.description: Percentage deducted from the proposed grade for late submissions (0–100).
latePenaltyPercent.title: Late Penalty (%)

rubricId.description: UUID of the Rubric used to grade submissions. Null for unstructured/holistic grading.
rubricId.title: Rubric ID

groupSubmission.description: When true, a Submission may list multiple learnerIds (group hand-in).
groupSubmission.title: Group Submission

visibleFrom.description: Earliest datetime at which the assignment is visible to learners. Null = immediately visible.
visibleFrom.title: Visible From

visibleUntil.description: Latest datetime at which the assignment is visible to learners. Null = always visible after publication.
visibleUntil.title: Visible Until

plagiarismProvider.description: Pluggable plagiarism-check provider identifier (e.g. 'turnitin', 'ouriginal'). Resolved to OCA\Scholiq\Plagiarism\ProvidesPlagiarismCheck at runtime. No built-in provider — hook only.
plagiarismProvider.title: Plagiarism Provider

competencyIds.description: UUIDs of Competency taxonomy nodes (competency capability) a graded Submission for this assignment provides evidence for. Additive field — existing rows leave it empty. When set, CompetencyAttainmentRollupHandler treats every listed competency as aligned when the resulting GradeEntry (sourceKind: assignment-submission) publishes.
competencyIds.title: Competency IDs

lifecycle.description: Assignment lifecycle state. Managed by OR lifecycle engine.
lifecycle.title: Lifecycle State

isOverdue.description: True when dueAt is set and is in the past.

submissionCount.description: Total number of Submission objects linked to this Assignment.

Submission.title: Submission
Submission.description: A learner's (or group's) hand-in for an Assignment. Carries file attachment references (bytes live in OpenRegister file attachments), rubric scores from the teacher's marking, and the proposed grade before it becomes a GradeEntry via the grading spec.

assignmentId.description: UUID of the Assignment this submission is for.
assignmentId.title: Assignment ID

learnerIds.description: Nextcloud user IDs of the learner(s) who submitted. One entry for solo submissions; multiple for group submissions.
learnerIds.title: Learner IDs

learnerRefs.description: UUID references to the LearnerProfile object(s) who submitted — the portal-subject scoping key (ADR-046 A4). Distinct from learnerIds, which are Nextcloud user ids. Additive and optional; the portal matches the student subject's LearnerProfile UUID against this array (membership). Existing rows leave it unset and stay invisible to the portal (fail-closed) until backfilled.
learnerRefs.title: Learner Refs

attachmentRefs.description: OpenRegister file attachment references (nc:files paths or OR attachment IDs). The app does NOT store file bytes.
attachmentRefs.title: Attachment References

submittedAt.description: Timestamp when the learner dispatched the `submit` transition. Null while in draft.
submittedAt.title: Submitted At

feedbackText.description: Free-text teacher feedback returned to the learner when the Submission is returned.
feedbackText.title: Feedback

gradeEntryId.description: UUID of the GradeEntry created/updated by the grading spec when the teacher marks this submission. Set by the grading spec; read-only from this spec's perspective.
gradeEntryId.title: Grade Entry ID

rubricScores.description: Teacher's per-criterion marking against the Rubric. Each entry records which level was achieved and the points awarded.

points.description: Points awarded for this criterion (from the selected level).
points.title: Points Awarded

rubricScores.title: Rubric Scores

proposedGrade.description: Sum of rubricScores[].points as entered by the teacher. Null before marking. Reduced by Assignment.latePenaltyPercent when isLate is true to yield effectiveGrade.
proposedGrade.title: Proposed Grade

lifecycle.description: Submission lifecycle state. Managed by OR lifecycle engine.
lifecycle.title: Lifecycle State

isLate.description: True when the submission lifecycle is `late`.

effectiveGrade.description: proposedGrade reduced by Assignment.latePenaltyPercent when isLate is true. Null before marking.

x-property-rbac._comment: WF1 (wave-12): submissions contain learner responses and grades — academic PII. Learner sees own submissions; admins see all.

name.description: Display name of this item bank.

description.description: Optional description of the item bank.

subject.description: Subject or topic area (e.g. 'Mathematics'). Null = cross-subject.

itemIds.description: UUIDs of Items belonging to this bank.

itemBankId.description: UUID of the owning ItemBank. Null for standalone items.
itemBankId.title: Item Bank ID

qtiBody.description: QTI 3.0 item body XML/JSON. Canonical stored form.
qtiBody.title: QTI Body

correctResponse.description: Correct response declaration. Null for extendedText/essay items which require manual scoring.
correctResponse.title: Correct Response

maxScore.description: Maximum score achievable for this item.
maxScore.title: Maximum Score

subjectTags.description: Subject or topic tags for cross-bank searching.
subjectTags.title: Subject Tags

competencyIds.description: UUIDs of Competency taxonomy nodes (competency capability) this item covers, for cross-bank filtering alongside subjectTags. Additive field — existing rows leave it empty. lifecycle.description: Lifecycle state. Managed by OR's lifecycle engine.

courseId.description: UUID of the associated Course. Null if scoped to session or cohort only.
